summary:
- @londons_explore proposes using a jointly trained decoder to convert vectors back into documents, suggesting combining vectors of "Harry Potter" and "Lord of the Rings" to generate a new book about Frodo attending wizard school to collect the ring and defeat Voldemort at Mount Doom.  
- @antirez confirms this approach works with image embeddings and shares a YouTube link demonstrating the concept.  
- The discussion highlights the potential of vector arithmetic and decoders for creative content generation across text and modalities.
